sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n99743" key="sundiafqora/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνδια-φθορά</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n99743.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mutual corruption,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cod.Just.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3.44(45)</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
